description_long: This object is a stylized potted plant with broad, pointed green leaves radiating outward from a central base. The leaves are thick and slightly curved, with visible creases and shading that suggest a waxy, succulent-like texture. There is no visible pot or container, and the plant appears to be a single, cohesive cluster without any flowers or additional decorative elements. The coloration is a consistent, vibrant green with subtle variations in shading to indicate depth and leaf overlap. The plant's form is compact and low to the ground, making it suitable for placement in small urban spaces. No plant label or tag is visible on or near the plant.
description: A compact, stylized potted plant with broad, pointed green leaves arranged in a dense cluster. The plant has a waxy, succulent-like appearance and lacks visible pot or decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical arrangement of broad, pointed green leaves radiating outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the curvature and thickness of the leaves, with some leaves overlapping.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the inner structure and depth of the leaf cluster, with darker shading.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the angled orientation of the leaves and their layered arrangement.
